definition: OOS = UniProt accession NOT among the 69 gold tuning-set accessions used to develop the dead-call gate.

detection_channels.description: Dead-call = structure gate OR text classifier OR fold-specific catalytic-residue motif.
detection_channels.channel_structure: Existing motif/domain gate (ePK VAIK/HRD/DFG, GHKL, phosphatase CX5R, M-CSA constellation).
detection_channels.channel_text: LLM classifier over UniProt function comment; high-confidence explicit self-inactivity only (two-pass, strict).
detection_channels.channel_foldmotif: Zn-His triad (alpha-carbonic-anhydrase), catalytic His (NDPK), catalytic Cys nucleophile (thiol-mechanism ALDH, EC 1.2.1.*), by alignment to CA2/NME1/ALDH2.
detection_channels.note: On the OOS pseudo set the text and fold-motif channels are redundant on the CARPs (both fire); the fold-motif channel adds orthogonal structural confirmation and robustness where annotation is uninformative.

MR_separation.interpretation: MR is higher in actives by construction (pocket retention); AUC<0.5 expected. MR is the metabolite-sensor discovery lever, not a deadness detector.

method_note: Dead-call gate -> sens/spec. Layers added this version: LLM function-text classifier + fold-specific catalytic-residue motifs. MR unchanged.
